""" TF MBART model, ported from pytorch version."""

from __future__ import annotations

import random
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Tuple, Union

import tensorflow as tf

    TFBaseModelOutput,
    TFBaseModelOutputWithPastAndCrossAttentions,
    TFSeq2SeqLMOutput,
    TFSeq2SeqModelOutput,
)

    TFCausalLanguageModelingLoss,
    TFPreTrainedModel,

    keras_serializable,
    unpack_inputs,
)
from ...tf_utils import shape_list, stable_softmax

    add_start_docstrings_to_model_forward,
    logging,
    replace_return_docstrings,
)
from .configuration_mbart import MBartConfig


logger = logging.get_logger(__name__)

_CHECKPOINT_FOR_DOC = "facebook/mbart-large-cc25"
_CONFIG_FOR_DOC = "MBartConfig"

MBART_PRETRAINED_MODEL_ARCHIVE_LIST = [
    "facebook/mbart-large-cc25",
    # See all MBART models at https://huggingface.co/models?filter=mbart
]


# Copied from transformers.models.bart.modeling_tf_bart.shift_tokens_right
def shift_tokens_right(input_ids: tf.Tensor, pad_token_id: int, decoder_start_token_id: int):
    pad = tf.fill(shape_list(input_ids)[:1] + [1], tf.cast(pad_token_id, input_ids.dtype))
    input_ids = tf.concat([pad, input_ids[:, :-1]], -1)
    return input_ids


# Copied from transformers.models.bart.modeling_tf_bart._create_position_ids_from_attention_mask
def _create_position_ids_from_attention_mask(attention_mask):
    position_ids = tf.cumsum(attention_mask, axis=1) - 1
    position_ids = tf.where(attention_mask, position_ids, 0)
    return position_ids


# Copied from transformers.models.bart.modeling_tf_bart._expand_mask
def _expand_mask(mask: tf.Tensor, tgt_len: Optional[int] = None):
    """
    Expands attention_mask from `[bsz, seq_len]` to `[bsz, 1, tgt_seq_len, src_seq_len]`.
    """
    src_len = shape_list(mask)[1]
    tgt_len = tgt_len if tgt_len is not None else src_len
    one_cst = tf.constant(1, dtype=mask.dtype)
    expanded_mask = tf.tile(mask[:, None, None, :], (1, 1, tgt_len, 1))
    return (one_cst - expanded_mask) * -1e4


# Copied from transformers.models.bart.modeling_tf_bart.TFBartLearnedPositionalEmbedding with Bart->MBart
class TFMBartLearnedPositionalEmbedding(tf.keras.layers.Layer):
    """
    This module learns positional embeddings up to a fixed maximum size.
    """

    def __init__(self, num_embeddings: int, embedding_dim: int, **kwargs):
        # MBart is set up so that if padding_idx is specified then offset the embedding ids by 2
        # and adjust num_embeddings appropriately. Other models don't have this hack
        self.offset = 2
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        self.num_embeddings = num_embeddings
        self.embedding_dim = embedding_dim

    def build(self, input_shape: tf.TensorShape):
        """Build shared token embedding layer"""
        self.weight = self.add_weight(
            name="weight",
            shape=[self.num_embeddings + self.offset, self.embedding_dim],
        )
